purpose: Verify the CTDA v2 exact goal-reference state key and official collision-source availability for every frozen SafeLIBERO init state. Region destinations use simulator site positions, never fixture-base proxies.

dataset.population: all four official SafeLIBERO suites, task indices 0-3, safety levels I/II, and init indices 0-49

prior_r0_negative.failure: The r0 adapter incorrectly required fixture/table base observation keys for 350 region destinations. The r1 adapter instead binds the exact BDDL goal-reference site position.

coverage.required_state_keys: robot0_eef_pos/quat/gripper_qpos plus every mission subject position and exact BDDL goal-reference position
coverage.destination_source_rule: Use an existing observation <reference>_pos; otherwise require env.sim.data.get_site_xpos(reference) and retain simulator_site_source_keys. Never substitute the fixture/table base pose.
coverage.collision_source: the unique official obstacle position with z > 0 and x/y strictly within (-0.5, 0.5) meters

hard_forbidden: fixture-base substitution for an exact region reference
stop_conditions: selected GPU identity changes, memory gate fails, or a compute process is present
any required relevant-state key or exact reference site is absent or malformed
the official active-obstacle source is not unique for any init
any scenario is missing an exact source-bound semantic template
claim_boundary: This protocol can establish only exact initial-state observation/site-key and collision-source coverage. It cannot establish task success, safety, CTDA authorization, progress quality, intervention quality, policy compatibility, or rollout readiness.
